name: Fruit Salad Supreme
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Green onions or 1 small sweet onion, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. On individual plates, arrange watercress, pineapple and oranges.
2. Top with cantaloupe and sliced onions.
3. In a small bowl, whisk together oil, lime juice, sugar and hot pepper sauce until the sugar is dissolved.
4. Stir in sour cream.
5. Serve with salads.
